title: Detected usage of the `any` type
description: The `any` type can sometimes leak into your codebase. TypeScript compiler skips the type checking of the `any` typed variables, so it creates a potential safety hole, and source of bugs in your codebase. We recommend using `unknown` or `never` type variable.

title: Use default imports for only default exports
description: It is recommended to use default imports only if there is a default export in the module being imported. If there are no default exports in the source module, it is better to use named imports, and it helps the build tools while optimizing the code.

title: Use default imports for only default exports
description: It is recommended to use default imports only if there is a default export in the module being imported. If there are no default exports in the source module, it is better to use named imports, and it helps the build tools while optimizing the code.

title: Prefer var declarations be placed at the top of their scope
description: Declare variables at the top of their scope as it improves code readability, performance and also helps in code navigation.

title: Detected empty functions
description: Having empty functions hurts readability, and is considered a code-smell. There's almost always a way to avoid using them. If you must use one, consider adding a comment to inform the reader of its purpose.

title: Function with cyclomatic complexity higher than threshold
description:
A function with high cyclomatic complexity can be hard to understand and
maintain. Cyclomatic complexity is a software metric that measures the number of
independent paths through a function. A higher cyclomatic complexity indicates
that the function has more decision points and is more complex.

description:
A function with high cyclomatic complexity can be hard to understand and
maintain. Cyclomatic complexity is a software metric that measures the number of
independent paths through a function. A higher cyclomatic complexity indicates
that the function has more decision points and is more complex.
